title: Benny's HWU Pack
description: A fan-made texture pack for the HWU on 2b2t.org
body:
This is a texture pack that I made for fun and personal use, figured I'd share it if anyone cared.

So far it mainly changes blocks that are commenly found in the nether on the highways to be cleaner and easier on my eyes. It changes obsidian, crying obsidian, bedrock, and netherack. 

Plus, it makes crystals a little cleaner and adds an easter egg where the sides of the cystal say HWU. I also changed the enderchest and chests to be cleaner and added HWU to the sides of the enderchest, and I changed one of the 1x2 paintings to say HWU. 

I'm completely open to any sort of suggestions, requests, hate comments, etc. that you want to share, I'll plan on continuing to add to this so we'll see where this goes. Again, it's for personal use but if anyone wants to use it, go ahead, I don't care. 

I do already plan on adding more stuff, I'm just not sure what I want to do next, I'm thinking maybe shulker boxes, signs, armor and tools, or GUI stuff. I'm not sure yet.
